message:
Add 14 signal handling behavioral tests to daemon module

Tests cover Unix signal behavior simulations:
- SIGTERM/SIGINT: graceful shutdown via running flag
- SIGHUP: config reload while running
- Cross-thread signal delivery
- Idempotent multiple shutdown signals
- Stats preservation on shutdown
- Click/rotation processor config updates on reload
- Mic mode and connected state on shutdown
- Uptime calculation from start_time

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
